title: Claude Fable 5 plays Factorio
summary: Claude Fable 5 autonomously plays Factorio, a factory-building game, strategizing and constructing automated factories without human intervention. The video showcases the model's ability to handle complex planning and execution tasks.
writeup: The video shows Claude Fable 5 playing Factorio, a factory-building game, on its own without human intervention. It demonstrates the model strategizing and constructing automated factories, framing the game as a test of complex planning and execution. The takeaway is a look at agentic behavior in a long-horizon environment that requires sequencing many dependent build and automation steps.
